lines.raw: What was the danger? | 危险是什么？

lines.english: As the man tried to swing the speedboat round, the steering wheel came away in his hands.
lines.chinese: 当那人试图把快艇转弯时，方向盘脱落在他手中。
lines.raw: As the man tried to swing the speedboat round, the steering wheel came away in his hands. | 当那人试图把快艇转弯时，方向盘脱落在他手中。

lines.english: He waved desperately to his companion, who had been water skiing for the last fifteen minutes.
lines.chinese: 他绝望地向他的同伴挥手，他的同伴在过去的15分钟里一直在滑水。
lines.raw: He waved desperately to his companion, who had been water skiing for the last fifteen minutes. | 他绝望地向他的同伴挥手，他的同伴在过去的15分钟里一直在滑水。

lines.english: Both men had hardly had time to realize what was happening when they were thrown violently into the sea.
lines.chinese: 两名男子还没来得及意识到发生了什么，就被猛地甩进海里。
lines.raw: Both men had hardly had time to realize what was happening when they were thrown violently into the sea. | 两名男子还没来得及意识到发生了什么，就被猛地甩进海里。

lines.english: The speedboat had struck a buoy, but it continued to move very quickly across the water.
lines.chinese: 快艇撞上了一个浮标，但它仍然在水面上快速行驶。
lines.raw: The speedboat had struck a buoy, but it continued to move very quickly across the water. | 快艇撞上了一个浮标，但它仍然在水面上快速行驶。

lines.english: Both men had just begun to swim towards the shore,
lines.chinese: 两名男子刚开始向岸边游去，
lines.raw: Both men had just begun to swim towards the shore, | 两名男子刚开始向岸边游去，

lines.english: when they noticed with dismay that the speedboat was moving in a circle.
lines.chinese: 却沮丧地发现快艇正在画圈行驶。
lines.raw: when they noticed with dismay that the speedboat was moving in a circle. | 却沮丧地发现快艇正在画圈行驶。

lines.english: It now came straight towards them at tremendous speed.
lines.chinese: 它现在以惊人的速度径直朝他们冲来。
lines.raw: It now came straight towards them at tremendous speed. | 它现在以惊人的速度径直朝他们冲来。

lines.english: In less than a minute, it roared past them only a few feet away.
lines.chinese: 不到一分钟，它咆哮着从他们身边几英尺的地方冲过。
lines.raw: In less than a minute, it roared past them only a few feet away. | 不到一分钟，它咆哮着从他们身边几英尺的地方冲过。

lines.english: After it had passed, they swam on as quickly as they could because they knew that the boat would soon return.
lines.chinese: 快艇驶过之后，他们尽力快速向前游，因为他们知道快艇很快就会回来。
lines.raw: After it had passed, they swam on as quickly as they could because they knew that the boat would soon return. | 快艇驶过之后，他们尽力快速向前游，因为他们知道快艇很快就会回来。

lines.english: They had just had enough time to swim out of danger when the boat again completed a circle.
lines.chinese: 他们刚来得及游出危险区域，快艇又完成了一圈。
lines.raw: They had just had enough time to swim out of danger when the boat again completed a circle. | 他们刚来得及游出危险区域，快艇又完成了一圈。

lines.english: On this occasion, however, it had slowed down considerably.
lines.chinese: 然而，这一次，它已经明显减速了。
lines.raw: On this occasion, however, it had slowed down considerably. | 然而，这一次，它已经明显减速了。

lines.english: The petrol had nearly all been used up.
lines.raw: The petrol had nearly all been used up. | 汽油差不多用完了。

lines.english: Before long, the noise dropped completely and the boat began to drift gently across the water.
lines.chinese: 不久，噪音完全消失了，快艇开始在水面上轻轻地漂浮。
lines.raw: Before long, the noise dropped completely and the boat began to drift gently across the water. | 不久，噪音完全消失了，快艇开始在水面上轻轻地漂浮。
